DAVID W. AMMONS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS SANDRA L. RIBERA, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF DWIGHT SAUNDERS IS GRANTED for good cause shown. Counsel for Plaintiff to provide Defendant with Plaintiff's last known address. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
